source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Dropped Objects Incident

event.top_event: Dropped Objects - Traveling Block and Drill Line
actions_taken: Drawworks drum drill line clamp replaced
Approximately 123 feet of drill line replaced
Third party investigation commissioned by Arena Energy
event.summary: On 20 July 2017 at 16:45 hours, Arena Offshore, LP experienced a dropped objects incident during drilling operations at Eugene Island Block 251C. While conducting non-routine top-drive removal and installation, the traveling block descended approximately 10-20 feet and drill line unspooled from the drawworks drum, causing the traveling block to land on the rotary table and approximately 123 feet of drill line to fall to the rig floor. The incident was caused by improper drill line tension and inadequate clamp design, resulting in damage to the drawworks drum drill line clamp and drill line. No injuries or structural damage occurred.
recommendations: Prior to top-drive removal, slip additional wraps of drill line onto drawworks drum to prevent slack and unseating from drum grooves
Verify properly sized drawworks drill line clamp is installed with certified bolts
Verify recertification of drawworks drum shafts includes inspection of drum drill line clamp
Incorporate inspection of drum drill line clamp into rig's drawworks preventative maintenance program and annual lifting gear inspection

threats.name: Inadequate drill line wraps on drawworks drum during light load operations
Improper sized drill line clamp installation
Improper clamp bolts and nuts installation
Repetitive drawworks operation causing line slack and clamp exposure to excessive tension
Insufficient pre-job safety analysis for light traveling block load operations

consequences.name: Traveling block descent to rotary table
Drill line fall to rig floor
Drawworks drum drill line clamp damage

controls.name: Drawworks drum drill line clamp
controls.barrier_role: Mechanical restraint to secure drill line to drawworks drum
controls.lod_basis: Primary mechanical barrier to prevent drill line unspooling

supporting_text: the drill line clamp became exposed to excessive tension and the drill line pulled free from the clamp
improper sized drill line drum clamp and clamp bolts were installed on the drawworks drum
a proper torque value would be impossible to maintain when installed and at least one lock nut would not reach its proper position to ensure it could not back off during operation

controls.name: Drill line wraps on drawworks drum
controls.barrier_role: Mechanical grip to maintain line tension and prevent slack
controls.lod_basis: Primary mechanical barrier to maintain drill line tension and seating

supporting_text: the 7 to 9 wraps on the drawworks drum required to suspend loads became loose
Operating the empty travel block on 12 lines without the top-drive, or a substantial load, will not provide enough line tension to keep the line wrapped tight against the drum
failure to include enough drawworks drum drill line wraps to ensure proper seating on the drum grooves

controls.name: Drawworks brake operation and control
controls.barrier_role: Operator control to manage traveling block descent and maintain line tension
controls.lod_basis: Operator-dependent control to prevent improper drawworks operation

supporting_text: The OIM's use of the traveling block to assist in laying down the motor and transmission loosened the wraps on the drum
The differences in the traveling block operator's capability to operate the drawworks brake to ensure proper fast line tension could have been a contributing cause of the incident
The OIM, operating the traveling block at the time of the incident, performed similar travel block operations as the Driller performed the day before

controls.name: Pre-job safety analysis (PJSA)
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to identify hazards and control measures for non-routine operations
controls.lod_basis: Planning and hazard identification control for non-routine top-drive removal task

supporting_text: failure to identify the hazards in the pre-job job safety analysis of controlling a lighter traveling block load while maintaining drill line tension so that the drill line was properly seated in the drum grooves on the drawworks drum

controls.name: Traveling block dolly and guide track
controls.barrier_role: Mechanical containment to prevent traveling block from falling further
controls.lod_basis: Secondary mechanical barrier to limit consequence severity

supporting_text: The traveling block was held upright by the traveling block dolly on the guide track

controls.name: Supervision during drilling operations
controls.barrier_role: Administrative oversight to ensure safe and workmanlike operations
controls.lod_basis: Management control to oversee operational safety during non-routine tasks

supporting_text: a G-110 Incident of Noncompliance (INC) was issued to Arena Offshore (Arena) failed to provide adequate supervision during drilling operations
failure to perform drilling operations in a safe and workmanlike manner

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
